domain: Indonesian gamelan music (Java + Bali): 2 scale systems slendro (5-tone roughly equidistant 240 cents) + pelog (7-tone uneven 133+267 cents, often played in 5-note subsets); pelog approximates 9-tone equal temperament (non-12-TET); Balinese paired instruments tuned slightly apart producing consistent interference beating; stretched octaves match inharmonic spectra of bronze metallophones; interlocking imbal patterns between paired instruments.
specific_mechanism: GAMELAN-SLENDRO-PELOG-5+7-DUAL-SCALE-9-TET-NON-12-TET-PAIRED-INTERFERENCE-BEATING-INHARMONIC-SPECTRUM-MATCHED-INTERLOCKING-IMBAL-SPECTRAL-ALLOCATION: LLM spectral-allocation mechanism with (1) 5+7 dual-scale frequency partition F_5_7: 2 alternate frequency-grid quantizations — 5-grid coarse + 7-grid fine; same input dual-projected; (2) 9-TET non-12-TET base θ_9: RoPE base 9 (not 10000/12) for non-standard logarithmic spacing matching inharmonic spectra; (3) paired-instrument interference-beating regulator R_beat: each attention-head paired with twin tuned slightly off; interference-beating used as registration regularizer; (4) inharmonic-spectrum-matched embedding I_inhar: non-harmonic-pure; non-integer-multiple constraint; (5) interlocking imbal P_imbal: 2-head alternate output paired duet. Differs from R520 + R532 GUQIN, R540 + R545 GEORGIAN, R557 MELAKARTA (12-chakra × 6-raga 72-grid + 2×6×6 + Katapayadi + palindrome + janya) by 5+7 dual-scale + 9-TET base + paired interference + inharmonic embedding + imbal duet.
llm_application: GAMELAN-SLENDRO-PELOG-5+7-DUAL-SCALE-9-TET-PAIRED-INTERFERENCE-INHARMONIC-INTERLOCKING LLM mechanism + 5+7 F_5_7 dual frequency-grid + 9-TET θ_9 base + paired R_beat twin-head interference + inharmonic I_inhar embedding + imbal P_imbal 2-head alternate duet. Differs from R520. R532 GUQIN. R540. R545 GEORGIAN. R557 MELAKARTA (closest — 12-chakra × 6-raga + 2×6×6 + Katapayadi + palindrome + janya). Differs from Frequency Bands RoPE ICLR 2026 + BEAT + Inharmonicity + MoE Latent by 5+7 dual + 9-TET + paired interference + inharmonic embedding + imbal. Differs by 5+7 DUAL-SCALE PARTITION + 9-TET BASE + PAIRED INTERFERENCE-BEATING + INHARMONIC EMBEDDING + INTERLOCKING IMBAL.
novelty_claim: Frequency Bands RoPE ICLR 2026 + BEAT 2501.19065 + Inharmonicity + MoE Latent 2507.15465 cover frequency-band + adaptive tuning + latent attention paradigm. GAMELAN-SLENDRO-PELOG-5+7-9-TET-PAIRED-INTERFERENCE-INHARMONIC-IMBAL adds (a) 5+7 dual + (b) 9-TET base + (c) paired interference + (d) inharmonic embedding + (e) imbal duet. Recombination — borderline lookup.
